summary:
ICD-10 stands for the International Statistical Classification of Diseases and Related Health Problems, 10th Revision. It is used globally to classify diseases and health conditions across various medical domains such as pregnancy outcomes, respiratory issues, and tumors.  

Note: The summary strictly adheres to only two sentences with a focus solely on clinically significant aspects related to disease categorization.
